schema_fix.reason: OpenClaw v2026.4.2 rejects unknown keys under agents.defaults.models.*

service_status.dashboard_probe: https://control.orisfy.com returned HTTP 401 Basic Auth as expected

routing_principle: OpenClaw binds to logical model openrouter/auto only; real provider/model selection is owned by ORIS runtime_plan free-model failover chain.
operator_note: If Basic Auth credentials are unknown, reset them at the Nginx htpasswd layer; passwords cannot be recovered from htpasswd hashes.
next_step: Use browser to test https://control.orisfy.com after Basic Auth reset or credential lookup.
